item.title: ONLY Womens Medium Blue Denim Jeans
item.description: Sie können ONLY Womens Medium Blue Denim Jeans hier: ℹ️: Regular 92% Baumwolle, 6% Elastomultiester, 2% Elastane Only Blush Mid Rise Skinny Jeans 🛒 Hier!!
